    WHERE INTEGRATION
    INSPIRES INNOVATION

    Pro Integration Future Asia is APAC's leading event for Professional AV, Lighting, Immersive technology & Systems Integration. 

    Think of this as the API for innovation—a space where professionals integrate their knowledge and technology to deliver real-world applications across multiple verticals.  

    Experience a fully connected sensory journey like no other.  

    11-13 November 2025 | Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Singapore

    REGISTER NOW TO ATTEND

    WELCOME TO PRO INTEGRATION FUTURE ASIA

    APAC's leading event for Professional AV, Lighting, Immersive technology & Systems Integration 

    Pro Integration Future Asia (PIFA) returns for its 3rd edition as APAC’s premier trade show, organised by Nineteen Group in partnership with the Pro AudioVisual and Lighting Integration Association of Singapore (AVLIAS). 

    As a dedicated business platform, PIFA 2025 brings together professional AVL suppliers and specialists to showcase cutting-edge real-world applications tailored for multiple vertical markets across Southeast Asia. 

    Discover the limitless potential of this ever-evolving industry and engage with a dynamic community driving the future of AVL innovation in the region.

    REGISTER NOW TO ATTEND

     

    WHAT'S ON

    CONNECT
    Join over 3,000 like-minded Pro AVL & ICT professionals and be part of the conversation shaping the Future of Pro AVL & Security. Engage with industry leaders, expand your network, and explore solutions that complete the entire ecosystem and supply chain.
    EXPERIENCE
    Immerse in the cutting-edge Pro AVL & Security innovations at PIFA 2025. Witness live demonstrations, explore the latest technologies, and gain hands-on insights from industry experts—empowering you to stay ahead in this ever-evolving 
    NETWORKING
    Connect with local and overseas industry leaders, system integrators, innovators, and professionals. Expand your network, explore new opportunities, and shape the future of Pro AVL & Security.
    CONFERENCE
    Gain insights from industry experts, thought leaders, and system integrators as they share the latest trends, innovations, and real-world applications in Pro AVL & Security. Stay ahead with exclusive knowledge and expert discussions.

    WHY VISIT?

    Engage with the latest Pro AVL & Security innovations, connect with local and overseas professionals, and gain valuable insights from industry experts and system integrators.  

    Explore new opportunities, stay ahead of trends, and be part of the future of AVL and security.

    REGISTER NOW

     

    SHOWCASE. INNOVATE. LEAD. 

    Exhibiting at PIFA is an opportunity to highlight expertise in professional AVL and security, unveil groundbreaking solutions, and connect with key industry players.  

    As a hub for collaboration and innovation, this event positions brands at the forefront of technological advancements—empowering you to shape the future and drive lasting impact. 

    BOOK A STAND

    BENEFITS OF ATTENDING

    IMMERSIVE INNOVATIVE SOLUTIONS
    Experience cutting-edge Pro AVL & Security solutions as the leading APAC trade show brings you live demonstrations and interactive showcases. Discover immersive technologies that transform industries and drive real-world applications across multiple verticals. 
    KNOWLEDGE & SKILL ENHANCEMENT
    Engage in insightful conference talks and interactive hands-on sessions to explore the latest trends and technologies in Pro AVL & Security. Experience real-world applications and gain practical knowledge to drive innovation in your business.
    CONNECTIONS & COLLABORATIONS
    Build valuable relationships and explore new partnership opportunities with local and international industry leaders, system integrators, and professionals in Pro AVL & Security.
    4-IN-1-SHOWS WITH 1 PASS
    Co-located with Safety & Security Asia, featuring The Security Event Asia, The Fire Safety Event Asia, and The Health & Safety Event Asia, PIFA gives you access to four major shows with just one pass. Join over 13,000 attendees for a 3-day event.

    INTEGRATED WORLD - SAFETY & SECURITY

    APAC's LARGEST EVENT SERIES. 

    Dedicated to the safety & security of people, places and assets.

    3 action packed days of immersive live demonstrations, global leading manufacturers in security & safety market and forge powerful relationships to expand your network.

    Featuring The Security Event Asia, The Health & Safety Event Asia, The Fire Safety Event Asia and Pro Integration Future Asia.

    Safety & Security Asia places you at the heart of the industry, connecting you with key professionals involved in projects and crucial purchasing decisions throughout the safety and security buying process. 

    FIND OUT MORE

     

    6 EVENTS, 1 PASS.

    Experience a fully integrated hub for the entire safety & security industry.

    With just one pass, gain access to 6 interconnected events: Pro Integration Future Europe, The Security Event, The Workplace Event, The Health & Safety Event, The Fire Safety Event, and the National Cyber Security Show, all happening together at NEC Birmingham, UK.

    The co-location of these events means that it provides a comprehensive offering to the full buying chain, bringing the industry together under one roof.

    FIND OUT MORE

    WHERE INTEGRATION INSPIRES INNOVATION.

    Pro Integration Future Europe (PIFE) will light up the NEC Birmingham from April 28-30, 2026. The ultimate event for AV & lighting professionals, installers, integrators, consultants, and end users.

    The exhibition will feature the world’s top integration brands, giving you the chance to interact with products and see them in action. PIFE also offers a unique platform to elevate your networking and connect with key experts from across the sector. Stay ahead with our tailored, comprehensive content agenda, covering the latest trends and issues in integration.

    FIND OUT MORE

    EVENT STATISTICS

    200+
    World-leading Pro AVL Suppliers & System Integrators
    3,000+

    WHERE & WHEN

    11 NOVEMBER 2025: 09:30 - 17:30
    12 NOVEMBER 2025: 09:30 - 17:30
    13 NOVEMBER 2025: 09:30 - 17:00
